title: Heresiarchs
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Heresiarchs''' were a cult derived from [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] lore and teachings,<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref> known for its deterministic philosophy.<ref name="A">''[[Fate of the Jedi: Abyss]]''</ref> [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] had mastered and gone beyond the recovered teachings of the Heresiarchs long before his return in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]].<ref name="DES">''[[Dark Empire Sourcebook]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
A heresiarch is a founder or leader of a heretical doctrine or movement (cult), as considered by those who claim to maintain an orthodox religious tradition or doctrine. It is possible that 'Heresiarchs' is an abstract term for unorthodox [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark siders]] or simply their leaders, rather than a certain movement.

==Appearances==
*''[[Fate of the Jedi: Abyss]]'' {{Ab|Fate of the Jedi: Abyss (audiobook)}} {{Mo}}
